name: doh-resolver
note: DNS-over-HTTPS resolver reachability check. Reads the live server setting from SQLite through the admin API path, not only the .env default, and dispatches an RFC 8484 binary DoH query for `example.com IN A`. Verifies the resolver responds and returns at least one answer record, catching captive portals or transparent DNS poisoners that 200-OK reachability checks can miss. For operators in censored regions where Cloudflare DoH is blocked, switch to a regional DoH endpoint in the admin settings and re-run `ct doctor`.
